description_long: This is a whimsical ice cream shop building with a large, curved red roof and bright blue exterior walls. The most striking feature is a giant sculpted ice cream cone with a swirl of white ice cream, prominently mounted above the entrance. The front facade features a sign reading 'Ice Cream' in bold, retro-style lettering, inviting customers in. The building sits on a paved lot with small patches of green grass on either side, and the rear section appears to have a covered outdoor area with tables and benches. Windows and doors are visible on the sides, and the overall design is playful and inviting, reminiscent of mid-century roadside attractions. The color palette is dominated by red, blue, brown, and white, enhancing its cheerful, family-friendly appeal.
description: A playful ice cream shop with a giant ice cream cone sculpture above the entrance, red curved roof, blue walls, and retro signage. The building features a welcoming facade and a covered outdoor seating area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large ice cream cone sculpture, 'Ice Cream' sign, main entrance, and blue facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved red roof, blue side wall, and the protruding ice cream cone sculpture at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered outdoor seating area with tables and benches, and the back of the curved roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue wall, side windows, and the edge of the outdoor seating area.
attribute_signage: A large, retro-style sign reading 'Ice Cream' is mounted above the entrance, with white cursive letters on a brown background. The signage is highly visible and legible from the front.
attribute_displayed_ice_cream_imagery: A prominent 3D model of an ice cream cone with a white swirl is mounted above the entrance, serving as both decoration and advertisement.
attribute_service_window_or_counter: A service counter is present at the front entrance, directly beneath the ice cream cone sculpture and signage, easily accessible from the exterior.
attribute_outdoor_seating: Outdoor seating is present at the rear of the building, consisting of several tables and benches arranged under a covered area.
attribute_architectural_style: Retro roadside attraction style, characterized by bold colors, playful ornamentation, and a sculptural ice cream cone feature.
